programmes.show_name: Andre Rieu: I Lost My Heart In Heidelberg

programmes.show_name: Les Dawson's Parisienne Adventure: Urban Myths
programmes.show_description: The stand-up comedian flees to Paris to pursue his dream of becoming a novelist, but winds up becoming a pianist in a brothel.

programmes.show_name: Joan Rivers And Barbra Streisand: Urban Myths
programmes.show_description: 16-year-old Streisand rehearses for an off-Broadway play, with her fur-clad, demanding co-star Joan Rivers. Contains strong language and adult humour.

programmes.show_name: Catching Fire: The Story Of Anita Pallenberg
programmes.show_description: This intimate documentary reveals the story of a fierce rock 'n' roller, actress, muse and mother who rose to prominence in the 1960s and 1970s.
Discover the unique and grossly undervalued story of British landscape artist, Eric Ravilious, whose life as an artist during World War II is as compelling and enigmatic as his art.

programmes.show_name: Inside Art: Masterpieces From Buckingham Palace
programmes.show_description: Kate Bryan explores the exhibition Masterpieces From Buckingham Palace in The Queens Gallery, with works by Titian, Rembrandt and more.

programmes.show_name: Peter O'Toole: Along The Sky Road to Aqaba
programmes.show_description: Feature documentary reflecting on Peter O'Toole's towering theatrical legacy. Includes interviews with Sir Anthony Hopkins, Sir Derek Jacobi and Stephen Fry.
